title: MV Skansonia: A Uniquely Beautiful Waterfront Wedding Venue in Seattle
content: # A Waterfront Wedding at The MV Skansonia: A Unique Seattle Wedding Venue. Couples and their guests are greeted by the gentle sounds of water lapping against the boat, setting the perfect backdrop for a unique wedding experience in the heart of Seattle. This unique location not only offers breathtaking views but also a sense of history, as guests can feel the charm of the ferry’s legacy while celebrating love.Choosing MV Skansonia ensures a memorable and one-of-a-kind wedding experience on the water. Couples are drawn to the charm and intimacy that mv skansonia offers, creating a unique wedding experience. If you’re envisioning a wedding that feels heartfelt, warm, and surrounded by water, The Skansonia offers something truly memorable. For couples planning a small wedding or micro wedding in Seattle, this historic wooden ferry turned event space offers something incredibly rare: intimacy on the water, without sacrificing elegance. For couples planning a micro wedding or intimate celebration, The Skansonia offers that perfect balance of charm, character, and understated luxury.

title: Unique Seattle Wedding and Event Venues
content: # MV Skansonia Event Venue. The MV Skansonia is Seattle’s premier waterfront venue. Constructed in 1929 by the Skansie Brothers, the Skansonia ferried cars and passengers between Vashon Island and Point Defiance for decades, before finding its permanent docking place on Lake Union and beginning its new career in event hosting. With its signature center bar, polished wood floors, a large outdoor deck, and a postcard view of the Seattle skyline, the Skansonia is the embodiment of iconic Seattle. Our event and catering services are routinely recognized as the best in the city. Award winning catering, flawless planning, audio visual, entertainment, florals, transportation, valet and more – we can plan and handle all the details giving you a seamless event. We love the doggies at the MV Skansonia and they are welcome to join for photos and the ceremony but we do ask that someone takes them home during cocktail hour before food is served.
